holdings.infoBox: RNEM is an equity ETF with a total of 307 individual holdings. The top holdings are Novatek Microelectronics stock at 3.92%, Titan Company at 3.18%, ANTA Sports Products at 2.71%, Tencent Holdings at 2.59%, and Reliance Industries at 2.57%.

overview.description: The First Trust Emerging Markets Equity Select ETF (RNEM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Riskalyze Emerging Markets index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of emerging-market stocks selected for low volatility. RNEM was launched on Jun 20, 2017 and is issued by First Trust.
